created.description: Timestamp when the object was created

e.description: The exponent value for the RSA public key

kty.description: Identifies the cryptographic algorithm family used with the key

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the object was last updated

n.description: The modulus value for the RSA public key

use.description: Intended use of the public key

x5c.description: Base64-encoded X.509 certificate chain with DER encoding

x5t#S256.description: Base64url-encoded SHA-256 thumbprint of the DER encoding of an X.509 certificate
